description.p: An extensive supplement to Eberron: Rising from the Last War, adding new character options for the world of Eberron. Includes the complete Artificer class with five subclasses (Alchemist, Armorer, Artillerist, Battle Smith, and Cartographer), seventeen backgrounds tied to the dragonmarked houses, five species (Changeling, Kalashtar, Khoravar, Shifter, and Warforged), twenty-eight feats including all twelve dragonmark feats and their greater variants, and the Homunculus Servant spell.
Requires: the 2024 Player's Handbook. Spells and origin feats granted by this content reference PHB (2024) elements.
